episodes.rationale: The derivatives rubric classifies an episode as explained_derivatives when |funding_rate_current| >= 0.0005 OR |oi_change_4h| >= 0.1. Here, funding_rate_current is -0.00060605, whose absolute value 0.00060605 exceeds the 0.0005 threshold, satisfying the funding leg of the rule. The oi_change_4h is 0.05498252594933356, which is below the 0.1 threshold and therefore normal, but the funding breach alone is sufficient to classify the episode as explained_derivatives. The funding_avg_4h of -0.00033475374999999996 is below threshold and is not the deciding metric; the rubric keys on funding_rate_current. No news context was supplied or evaluated, and per instructions no news refs are included. The price anomaly (peak |Z| = 3.32, 4h drawdown of -6.58%) is consistent with the negative funding rate signaling elevated short positioning in LUNAUSDT during the early stages of the Terra collapse period.
